subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou seest me and hearest my supplications. Thou art aware of my secrets and that which I declare openly, my hidden thoughts and manifest presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت ترانی و تسمع نجوائی و تطلع باسراری و اجهاری و غیبی و شهودی
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
